titleStmt.title: SII 11.168: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 168. (B.K. No. 196 of 1926-27.) JAKKALI, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB STANDING IN FRONT OF THE SAṄGAMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) who was ruling the kingdom from the nelevīḍu of Jayantīpura and introduces his subordinate, a Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara who was governing certain specified tracts including Keḷavāḍi Three-Hundred and the agrahāra Jakkili. It records the gift of land made to the temple of Sōmēśvara attached to the maṭha outside the village, by the officer in the presence of the Two-Hundred Mahājanas of the place.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama [year 43, Śārvari], Kārtika, śu. 1, Sunday, solar eclipse, which regularly corresponds to Sunday, 24th October, A.D. 1120. The tithi was actually Āśvina amāvāsyā on which day Kārttika śu. 1 commenced at ·21 and ended the next day at ·17. A solar eclipse occurred on this day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabhe mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanama
lladēvara vijayarājya tāraṁbaraṁ
jayaṁtīpurada nelevī tatpādapadmōpa
jīvigaḷappa . svasti
da kaṭakagēri tuṁga
ṇḍa pratāpamārtta maṇḍaḷikamu
khamaṇḍana murāri
mitramaṇḍaḷika maṇḍaḷikamā
ndhāta nāhava paṭṭa śrīma
tribhuvanamalladēvara prasastisahitaṁ
śrīmanumahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara nūṟumaṁ keḷavā
ḍi mūnūṟuma be ḍaṟa baḷiyagrahā
raṁ jakkiliyuma stisahitaṁ śrimanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kumāra poṟagaṇa maṭada śrī sōmēśvara
dēvara māhā keyyaṟuvaṇa
maṁ cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 43 neya śārvvarisaṁvatsarada kārttika suddha 1 Ā
divāra sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu sarbbabādhaparihāravāgi Ūroḍeya pramu
kha mahājanaṁga ḷinnūrbbara sannidhānadalu śrīsomēśvaradēvargge dhārāpūrvva
kaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunā
nuṣṭāṇaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpanna ranēkatarkkaśāstrapārāvāra
caturvvēdapāragarappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ jakkiliyūroḍeya pramukha mahāja
naṁgaḷinnūrvaru dēvarigāḷva hannirmmattaru keyyuma noṁdu mattaru hūdōṁṭamu ma dē
vargge svadharmmadiṁ sarbbabādhaparihāravāgi pratipāḷisuvaru dēvarigāḷva hannirmmatta
rkisu keygaṁ paḍuvalu maṇiya
ra keyiṁ baḍagalu vabbigeṟeya
dāri Ī dharmmava nārobbaru pratipāḷisuva mahāpuruṣargge prayāge vāraṇāsiyargghyatīrtthaga
ḷalli sāsirbbarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileyu maḷaṁkārasahitavāgitithiviśēṣaṁ
gaḷalu koṭṭa phala[makku . Īdharmma kkapāyamaṁ bageda mahā rgge] sāsirbba rvvēdapāragara
ppa brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsira kavileyumaṁ prayāge vāraṇāsi yargghya
tīrtthaṁgaḷalu koṁda [mahāpātakara gatiya neyduvar .] ©©©©
© sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarbbānē
tānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā [bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .] svadattaṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harīti va[sundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhā]yāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
